name: Nouvelles Recipe Book "Recettes de Nouvellez"
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｒｅｃｅｔｔｅｓ ｄｅ Ｎｏｕｖｅｌｌｅｚ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ルセット・ド・ヌーベルズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>～ヌーベルズのレシピ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>帳</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>～
desc: While you control a "Nouvelles" Monster Card, all face-up monsters your opponent controls are changed to Attack Position. Each time a monster(s) is Tributed by a Ritual Monster's effect, your opponent pays 850 LP. Once per turn, if you Special Summon a Ritual Monster(s) (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 of them; add 1 "Recipe" or "Nouvelles" card from your Deck to your hand, except a Continuous Spell, and if you do, increase that monster's Level by 1. You can only activate 1 "Nouvelles Recipe Book "Recettes de Nouvellez"" per turn.
eff: While you control a "Nouvelles" Monster Card, all face-up monsters your opponent controls are changed to Attack Position. Once per turn, if you Special Summon a Ritual Monster(s) (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 of them; add 1 "Recipe" or "Nouvelles" card from your Deck to your hand, except a Continuous Spell, and if you do, increase that monster's Level by 1. You can only activate 1 "Nouvelles Recipe Book "Recettes de Nouvellez"" per turn.

life_points: Your opponent pays Life Points for effect
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
